articles.title: Gold hits two-month low as US-Iran tension stokes inflation fears
articles.description: GOLD prices fell to a two-month low on Thursday as fresh U.S. attacks on Iran boosted the dollar and pushed oil prices higher, stoking concerns about rising inflation and clouding the interest rate outlook.

articles.title: Economic Tensions Flare as Euro Zone Bond Yields Rise Amid US-Iran Strikes
articles.description: Euro zone bond yields rose after the US and Iran exchanged strikes, affecting the ceasefire agreement and driving up oil prices. The increased tension saw Germany's 10-year bond yield rise alongside market predictions of ECB interest rate hikes, suggesting an unpredictable economic outlook.

articles.title: Middle East Tensions Rattle European Markets: Energy Prices Surge
articles.description: European shares fell as tensions in the Middle East affected the outlook for a significant deal involving the Strait of Hormuz. The pan-European STOXX 600 dropped 0.4% as crude oil prices rose due to escalating hostilities between Iran and the U.S., impacting various sectors, including airlines and technology.

articles.title: US Fed's Warsh Faces High-Stakes Test Amid Inflation and Global Tensions
articles.description: As Federal Reserve Chair, Kevin Warsh navigates a challenging economic landscape marked by soaring oil prices, inflation concerns, and international tensions. The upcoming Federal Open Market Committee meeting will determine key monetary policy decisions, with inflation and consumer sentiment at critical junctures.
